content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.04% with VIX +8% to 18.20 reflects risk-off; however defensives (Pharma +0.66%, FMCG strong, Healthcare) are outperforming materially. My book is heavily defensive-tilted which is working. With 51 minutes to close and CPI/macro events looming, focus on locking gains via trailing SLs on winners rather than adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.2%, SL 121 intact below entry 125.10. VIX spike and risk-off should support gold; thesis intact. SL has 2% buffer from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.2% gain, Q4 print strong (PAT +18%, India volume +9%), MOFSL TP 950. CMP 846.90, current SL 838 already at breakeven+. Holding SL (no-op MODIFY avoided — stored SL=838 matches). Bumping target to 875 to align with new ATH momentum. Actually no-op on SL — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.8% winner post Q4 blowout (PAT +134%, FY26 PAT +91.6%). CMP 1380, current SL 1365 sits 1.1% below CMP — already locks ~8.4% gain. SL trail-gap discipline satisfied (1.1% > 1.0% floor). Current SL is well-placed; this is no-op — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, CMP 2817, SL 2740 (2.7% buffer). Bullish MACD crossover, Q3 strong, chemicals recovery. Not yet at +2% trigger for breakeven trail. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% only, near entry. SL 8950 stays. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% but Q4 print strong (PAT +103% headline, +34% clean standalone), Rs 12000 buyback floor near, ICICI TP 12000. SL 10440 (~1.6% buffer). Hold for buyback record date May 29."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6% intraday but Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised to low double-digit. CMP 479, SL 470 (~1.9% buffer). Thesis intact — sector turning. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.9% winner, CMP 1274.80, SL 1255 = 1.55% trail-gap (above 1% floor). Triggers Rule (b): unrealized +4% threshold barely missed but +3.9% qualifies for at-least-breakeven; 1255 > entry 1226 already locks ~2.4% gain. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, Q4 blowout (UVG 16%, Sampann +69%), CMP 1261.70, SL 1198 (~5% buffer). Thesis fresh from today's catalyst. Hold for run to 1330 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, near entry. Order book +61% YoY, Q4 in line. CMP 861, SL 850 (~1.3% buffer). Hold; capital goods structural story intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. HSBC upgrade TP 9000, healthcare leadership. Q4 results May 20 — within binary window in ~7 sessions but not 3. SL 7950 (~1.8% buffer). Hold; will reassess closer to May 20."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, Q4 results May 21 (~7 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window). Pharma defensive, MACD bullish. SL 1830 (~2.3% buffer). Hold but flag for trim before May 21."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Research now flags BEARISH -0.10 modifier: Q4 PAT -15.1% YoY despite revenue beat, Tata 1mg B2C diagnostics launch threatens 40-50% margin compression per industry research, ICICI Sec cut TP to 1460 (below CMP). The defensive-diagnostics thesis I entered on does not survive the Tata 1mg structural overhang. CMP 1648.80 (-0.7%), exit at market for small loss before SL 1610 fires on a wider drawdown. Position thesis genuinely broken — not pre-SL panic."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry but +3.93% today, breaking 52w high 4555. Q4 May 21 (~7 sessions, outside 3-session binary). JB merger advancing. SL 4360 (~4% buffer). Hold; will reassess before May 21."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Risk-off bid intact; SL 121 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 838 (breakeven+); CMP 846.90 gives 1.0% trail-gap — right at floor. Don't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1365 locks +8.4% on a +9.8% winner; 1.1% trail-gap above floor. Don't churn."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 locks +2.4%; 1.55% gap from CMP — adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tata 1mg structural threat materialized in research post-entry; exit before SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong same-day movers (TORNTPHARM, LAURUSLABS, APOLLOHOSP, COFORGE) already represented in book. TATACONSUM pending LIMIT BUY @ 1240 is now stale — CMP 1261 well above limit, won't fill. New entries not warranted at 14:38 with VIX +8%, broad-market -1%, and pending CPI. Sun/Apollo/Torrent/Laurus all have Q4 prints within ~7 sessions — book is already binary-event-heavy for the coming week.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 55%, cash 45% (₹436k). Defensive sector tilt (Pharma 4 names, FMCG 3 names, Healthcare 1+1 diagnostics, IT 1, Auto 1, Chemicals 1, Capital Goods 2, ETF 1) is working in this risk-off tape — unrealized +₹5,412 vs market -1%. Multiple positions face Q4 binary events May 20-21 (APOLLOHOSP, SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM) — must trim or tighten before then per Rule 11. LALPATHLAB exit removes one name; reduces healthcare cluster. Will also CANCEL stale TATACONSUM open LIMIT in next decision cycle if not auto-expired (no schema slot for CANCEL here)."
}
